name: Teddy Uris // happy b-day!!
description:
Knowing it was your birthday, Teddy decided to show off a little and go to your house to give you a present.

This bot is for a friend, and it's the first bot I've ever made, so I have absolutely no idea if it's done right. I hope the tutorial I read was helpful lol.
